generated_oml:
instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by Antwerp harbor cranes"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoController, PowerSupplyUnit, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the gantry crane system"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement along crane frame"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist vertical movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup and release"
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for system operation"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval Motor Controller for Cart Stepper Motor"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval Motor Controller for Hoist Stepper Motor"
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model created using Autodesk Fusion 360 for gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization tool for deploying digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ValidationService, CraneSimulationService, FaultDetectionService, HMI
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for sensor data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for message transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, CraneSimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 for CAD modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ArduinoIDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino IDE for hardware programming"
    DTDFVocab:enables HMI
]

instance KiCad : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "KiCad for hardware design"
    DTDFVocab:enables HMI
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model for efficient crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateOptimizedTrajectory
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logging of historical sensor data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides LogData
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizeData
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationThresholdBreachInsight, AlertOperatorAction
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides RunSimulation
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using time series classification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight
]

instance HMI : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human Machine Interface for operator control of the crane"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlCrane
]

instance ValidationThresholdBreachInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert for validation threshold breaches detected during simulation comparison"
]

instance AlertOperatorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated dashboard alert for operators regarding validation breaches"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault localization insights derived from time series classification"
]

instance GenerateOptimizedTrajectory : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimized trajectory generation for efficient crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LogData : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic logging of sensor data to historical database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizeData : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization using Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RunSimulation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of crane dynamics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlCrane : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual operator control of crane movements via HMI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (optimal trajectories generated by Trajectory Generator Service) sent from Control Application to Physical Crane Interface, which drives the Cart and Hoist Motors."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for data logging and validation, with no specific time intervals specified but described as 'continuous' in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture with physical crane connected to a PC running Docker containers for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard; Python services for control, logging, trajectory generation, simulation, and validation integrated via MQTT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion 360), manufactured (physical hardware), and operated (real-time data logging and validation during crane operation) stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements with simulation outputs using distance metrics and thresholds; confidence bounds derived from simulations displayed in Grafana dashboard to assess model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Python-based interface for physical crane control; SQL queries for TimescaleDB data access."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a personal computer; Docker containers for TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto, and Grafana; Python gantrylib module deployed via pip installation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "No specific standards adhered to; ad-hoc implementation using open-source tools without formal digital twin standards."
]
